cost_components_summary: Placeholder incremental non-energy supply/abatement cost. Full agricultural production cost is outside Phase 1 scope.
input_basis_notes: Direct on-farm energy inputs only, allocated from official agriculture sector totals using bundle-level assumptions. Input coefficients are coarse and value-normalised.
emissions_boundary_notes: Direct on-farm energy emissions only. Biological process emissions are carried by explicit residual roles to keep product-output roles from hiding non-CO2 emissions.
rollout_limit_notes: Indicative upper-bound envelope only. Does not represent commodity markets, land competition or herd/crop stock dynamics.
availability_conditions: Available in all milestone years as coarse residual sector methods; not suitable for detailed agricultural technology competition.
evidence_summary: Anchored to official agriculture energy totals, official agriculture emissions totals, and ABS output-value data, with explicit bundle-allocation assumptions.
derivation_method: Coarse residual-sector synthesis. Official agriculture energy and emissions totals are allocated to two output bundles using transparent assumptions so the MVP model can retain agriculture without process-level build-out.
review_notes: This is a coarse residual sector block intended to preserve agriculture in national emissions accounting, not a farm-system model. Biological process emissions are now represented by explicit residual roles.
candidate_expansion_pathway: Split into cattle, sheep, dairy, broadacre crops, horticulture, fertiliser and manure management submodules.
times_or_vedalang_mapping_notes: Would likely remain partly reduced-form even in TIMES, but could expand into livestock and cropping activity/process chains with explicit non-CO2 emissions modules.
